items.title: No behavioral surface — dormant internal foundation verified by Layer 1 tests
items.precondition: PR #160 has no production writer or reader. PR #171 Path A removed the previously proposed writer and no longer owns this wiring.
items.expected: Layer-2 behavioral acceptance is N/A until a separately scoped owner adds a production writer, reader, and runnable surface.
items.evidence: Layer 1 retained and passed: focused taste-profile suites 4 files / 69 tests; full suite 64 files / 525 tests; TypeScript and strict conventions clean. PostgreSQL 16.14 proof passed migration up/down/re-up, nullable and non-null uniqueness, rollback, and serialized concurrent approvals.
items.notes: This single N/A item scopes only Layer 2. It does not replace or waive the Layer-1 model, migration, rollback, concurrency, and full-regression tests.
